Victory tastes better when it’s thrice as spicy! Congratulations to our amazing winners 🎊
From games to giggles to goofy debates — our event had it all! Here’s a glimpse of the madness in our fun eventt! 🤩

At WE Hub, supporting women innovators is a constant commitment.

The second round of Purple Tank, conducted at WE Hub in collaboration with IEEE MJCET, brought together seven teams pitching across three domains, with over 50 students actively participating. The event reflected the strength of collaboration in creating meaningful platforms for women students to ideate, pitch, and grow with confidence.

We are delighted to take this forward with MJCET hosting the Purple Tank event at WE Hub, and WE Hub supporting the curation of an exceptional all-women jury panel across Software Automation, Hardware Technology, and Fashion & Women-led Impact.

One more step towards building a supportive ecosystem where women-led ideas are encouraged, celebrated, and empowered.

@telanganacmo @offdsb

A year stitched together with events, ideas, and impact.

From Reverse Engineering, our first big success, to the Notebook Donation Drive, which touched lives beyond our campus, each initiative taught us something new. 🌸

We explored professional growth with LinkedIn Edge, innovation at Electrovenza, skills at Crack the Network, and compassion through our Old Age Home Visit. Even our Internal Growth Project found participants from outside the team, knowledge has no boundaries. 💜

And between it all, our Team Bonding Day for the people behind WIE.

Every event was more than a gathering. It was a lesson, a milestone, and a reminder of what collaboration can create. ✨

We’re not just recruiting — we’re building bots, breaking limits, and having a blast along the way!💫
Our student Chapter isn’t your average tech club — it’s where innovation meets creativity, and late-night coding meets midnight Fun.⚡

🤖 From HR to Events, Design to Marketing, Hardware to Software — we’ve got roles for the curious, the creative, the nerdy, and the bold. Whether you’re sketching ideas, managing people, coding , or just vibing with like-minded geeks, this is your place. 🎉

 *Why join us?* 
1. Build cool robots & mind-blowing tech.
2. Plan epic events & competitions
3. Learn by doing (and sometimes failing, but that’s fun too!)
4. Be at the core of workshops, competitions & hackathons
5. Make friends who geek out as much as you do

 *Be part of a team that laughs as hard as it works 🚀* 

👥 Who can apply?
Thinkers, doers, coders, dreamers, hustlers, creators — basically, *YOU* . 🌟
📅 Recruitment Dates: 25th and 26th September.
📍 Venue: Student Activity Centre (SAC 1st Block, 4th floor)
🕰️Time: 11 A.M.- 3:30 P.M.

👉 We’re recruiting across all domains!
